name: AI Talent Summit - Final Score (MCQ 40% + Prompting 60%)

parameters.content:
## AI Talent Summit - Final Score

Formula: final = (0.40 x MCQ) + (0.60 x prompting combined_score)

### Evolve (two different emails)
- **Evolve Admin Login:** YOUR_EVOLVE_ADMIN_EMAIL (API admin only — set in Evolve Admin Login node)
- **Fetch MCQ filter:** email = candidate from webhook payload

Do NOT use candidate email for admin login.

Round 1 schedule: 6a33a3a95f1bbf5aec52f319

api_base_url default: https://YOUR_API_PUBLIC_URL

### Webhook for other team (MUST be Active)
Production: https://agent.fsgarage.in/webhook/ai-talent-summit/final-score
NOT webhook-test. Toggle Active ON, then deactivate+reactivate if you see could not be started.

If login fails with Multiple logins not allowed: deactivate other Evolve workflows or ask team for API service account.

Manual Test.problem_statement: Build a todo app using React. Users must be able to: add a new task, mark tasks complete, delete tasks, and filter by All / Active / Completed. Show a task count. Use clean, minimal styling.
Manual Test.user_prompt: You are a React developer. Build a todo app using React (CDN in index.html). Features: text input + Add button, checkbox to complete (strikethrough), delete button, filter tabs All/Active/Completed, active task count. useState for state. Clean minimal CSS.
